# Configuration Gates

## Engine

Block casting/date, bore/stroke, heads, cam card, compression, induction, ignition, oiling, exhaust, and builder records.

## Chassis

Chassis number, tub type, material, repair history, suspension pickup geometry, body/clip provenance, and safety updates.

## Driveline

Transaxle make/model/serial, ratios, differential, clutch, halfshafts, joints, mounts, and shift linkage.

## Running Gear

Uprights, bearings, springs, dampers, anti-roll bars, brakes, wheels, tires, and center-lock hardware.

## Services

Fuel cell/tanks, pumps, regulators, oil system, cooling system, wiring, instruments, and fire system.
